svg.title: UML карта полів grant extraction та matching
svg.desc: Українська UML-style схема для junior developer: entities, DTOs, services, fields, extraction rules and matching relations.
svg.text: UML-style карта: grant fields, extraction, matching
Те, що реально є в implementation: entities, DTOs, services, поля, правила extraction і scoring.

Головний pipeline: CLI запускає source connector -> connector повертає FetchedGrant -> raw snapshot зберігається для audit -> draft нормалізується у Grant -> matching порівнює Grant з ClientProfile та ApplicationHistory -> explanations/dashboard читають готові DB поля.
UML legend: «Entity» = DB table/model, «DTO» = object між connector/service, «Service» = логіка, dashed arrow = dependency/call, solid arrow = relation/data flow.

g.text: MVP slugs: eu-funding, prostir, diia-business, gurt
HttpClient applies user-agent, timeout, retries, rate limit.
Errors are stored in ConnectorError and JobRun metadata.
identity: id, source_id, latest_raw_snapshot_id, source_record_id, source_url, application_url
dates/status: status, published_at, opens_at, deadline_at, deadline_text
Dedup/upsert: source_id + source_record_id, fallback source_id + source_url.
Feature card stored in extraction_metadata.feature_card: title, summary, status, deadline, program, funder, funding, countries, applicant_types, topics, manual review.
Used by matching, embeddings, explanations and dashboard.
Runs connector, stores raw snapshot, upserts grant.
One failed detail page does not break all ingestion.
LLM optional: summary, eligibility, restrictions, applicant_types, topics
Topics: AI, defence, dual-use, innovation, community,
Applicant types: SME, startup, company, NGO, consortium.
Countries: Ukraine, EU, Poland, Germany, Moldova, Georgia, Belarus.
Manual review: generic title, very short text, no topics/applicant types.
Result won/lost/rejected/not_submitted is context, not penalty.
Providers: hash for local deterministic smoke, OpenAI for semantic quality.
Writes embedding fields on Grant, ClientProfile, ApplicationHistory.
keyword score: topics, technologies, applicant fit, sector
history score: topic overlap, text hits, reusable_materials

svg.text: DashboardService читає Source, JobRun, Grant, ClientProfile, GrantClientMatch, Report. MatchExplanationService читає saved matches і пише explanation, risks_text, manual_checks, llm_score, match_metadata.llm_explanation.

g.text: input: saved match, grant profile, client profile
filters: source, status, topic, q, manual_review, min_score

svg.text: Key relations: Source 1 -> many RawGrantSnapshot; Source 1 -> many Grant; Grant 1 -> many GrantClientMatch; ClientProfile 1 -> many ApplicationHistory; MatchRun 1 -> many GrantClientMatch.
